name: The North Pole
overview: While about to get married, Homayoun and Arqavan fall victim to a betrayal. Homayoun from behind the bars, is counting down the minutes to avenge Saman and death arrives. Arsham Yekta is born. A girl named Sahra keeps him company to pave the way for revenge for Arsham.

trailers.title: Farzad Farzin - Ghotbe Shomal (Teaser) | فرزاد فرزین - تیزر آهنگ جدید قطب شمال
